pageContext.name: Knight Rider F.L.A.G Agent Kit
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Doctor Collector are excited to present the Knight Rider F.L.A.G Agent Kit Collectible Set!  Welcome to the Foundation for Law and Government (F.L.A.G), a private organization dedicated to fighting criminals who operate above the law. This kit contains everything you need to be a F.L.A.G Agent!  *This watch is a prop replica with basic watch functions, not a real commlink (no, you cannot talk with KITT).
